notes.title: EMPIRE AI Chat
notes.text:
# EMPIRE AI Chat (localhost:8097)

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]]. Your private gold-themed chat page (`empire-ai-chat/`, Node zero-dep server).

## What changed
The model dropdown now lists all 8 [[Models|EMPIRE models]] (empire-prime, ceo, trading, coder, strategist, research, media, fast) plus any local Ollama models.

- **empire-*** models → routed to the VPS router `http://64.227.6.197:8000/v1` (key `sk-empire-local`)
- local models → stay on local Ollama
- Mode dropdown (EMPIRE CORE / GOD MODE / Academic / Trading / Builder) injects [[GOD MODE Prompts]] server-side

## Files
`empire-ai-chat/server.js` (backend, edited), `index.html` (UI), `prompts.js` (GOD MODE library).

## To apply
Restart the local server: `PORT=8097 node ~/6-empires-os/empire-ai-chat/server.js` (or however it's launched). Verified: router answers empire-prime correctly.

Related: [[Models]] · [[Free LLM APIs]] · [[Infrastructure]]

notes.title: Free LLM APIs
notes.text:
# Free LLM APIs — 19 Providers Wired

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]]. Pulled from `awesome-free-llm-apis`. All OpenAI-compatible; auto-activate when a key is set.

## Fastest free picks
1. **Groq** ⚡ — console.groq.com/keys — `FREE_GROQ_KEY`
2. **Cerebras** ⚡ — cloud.cerebras.ai — `FREE_CEREBRAS_KEY`
3. **SambaNova** ⚡ — cloud.sambanova.ai — `FREE_SAMBANOVA_KEY`
4. **Google Gemini** — aistudio.google.com/app/apikey — `FREE_GOOGLE_GEMINI_KEY`
5. **OpenRouter** — openrouter.ai/keys — `FREE_OPENROUTER_KEY`

## How to activate (one line)
```
echo 'FREE_GROQ_KEY=gsk_...' >> /root/6-empires-os-full/.env
cd /root/6-empires-os-full && docker compose restart api
```
Then EMPIRE answers at full cloud speed. See [[Pending Actions]].

## MCP server
`empire-free-llm` exposes `list_free_providers`, `list_active_providers`, `free_chat`. Built per mcp-builder, py_compile verified.

Related: [[Models]] · [[Infrastructure]]

notes.title: GOD MODE Prompts
notes.text:
# GOD MODE Prompts (Academic Level)

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]]. Doctoral-level system prompts installed on all 8 [[Models]]. Method: decompose → reason step-by-step with assumptions → cite frameworks → decisive recommendation; honest about uncertainty.

## Reusable templates

> [!quote] Academic Deep Analysis
> Act at doctoral level. Analyze [TOPIC] from first principles: define problem + assumptions → theory/prior art → step-by-step reasoning (quantify) → 2–3 options w/ trade-offs → decisive recommendation + next actions. Separate fact / inference / speculation.

> [!quote] Red Team
> Steelman then stress-test [PLAN]. Strongest objections, hidden assumptions, failure modes, what would change your mind. Robustness 1–10.

> [!quote] Research Synthesis
> Academic synthesis on [QUESTION]: scope → key findings (with confidence) → conflicting evidence → implications → what to investigate next.

> [!quote] Socratic Tutor
> Teach [CONCEPT] to mastery: fundamentals → build up → check understanding each step → correct misconceptions → expert summary.

> [!quote] Strategy War-Game
> War-game [DECISION]: actors + incentives (game theory), base/bull/bear w/ probabilities + EV, dominant strategy + invalidation.

Related: [[Models]] · [[Free LLM APIs]]

notes.title: Infrastructure
notes.text:
# Infrastructure

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]].

## Server
- `empire-cpu` @ **64.227.6.197** — DigitalOcean nyc1, 4 vCPU AMD / 16GB RAM
- Old box `137.184.54.161` **destroyed** 2026-06-19 (stopped ~$48/mo double-billing)

## Services (Docker)
- Router/shim `:8000` `/v1` (key `sk-empire-local`) — streaming TTFB ~0.3s
- Open WebUI `:9090` — the [[Models|EMPIRE PRIME]] web interface
- Postgres, Redis, Qdrant, Neo4j
- Ollama `:11434` — `OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1`
- nginx + certbot installed → HTTPS ready (see [[Pending Actions]])

## Base models
`llama3.2:1b` (chat default), `llama3.2`, `mistral`, `nous-hermes2`, `nomic-embed-text`

## Knowledge base
`EMPIRE_KNOWLEDGE_V2` — 576 vectors in ChromaDB. Detached from models for CPU speed; re-enable on GPU. See [[Models]].

notes.title: Models
notes.text:
# Models — 8 Branded EMPIRE Agents

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]]. All carry: gold logo + role-tuned params + [[GOD MODE Prompts]].

| Model | Role | Temp |
|---|---|---|
| EMPIRE PRIME | Polymath flagship | 0.6 |
| EMPIRE CEO | Capital allocation, strategy | 0.5 |
| EMPIRE TRADING | Quant markets, risk-first | 0.4 |
| EMPIRE CODER | Principal engineer | 0.2 |
| EMPIRE STRATEGIST | Game theory, dynamics | 0.6 |
| EMPIRE RESEARCH | Academic-rigor research | 0.5 |
| EMPIRE MEDIA | Creative, persuasion | 0.85 |
| EMPIRE FAST | Rapid precision | 0.5 |

All route through the [[Infrastructure|router]] (`empire-router` → Ollama). Verified replying in-persona.

> [!tip] Use EMPIRE PRIME or EMPIRE STRATEGIST for deepest reasoning; EMPIRE FAST for speed.

Related: [[GOD MODE Prompts]] · [[Free LLM APIs]]

notes.title: OpenHuman
notes.text:
# OpenHuman (desktop app)

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]].

## Configured & saved
- LLM provider **EMPIRE GPU** → `http://64.227.6.197:8000/v1` (key `sk-empire-local`)
- Routing: Use Your Own Models → empire-router (saved)
- Voice: STT + TTS = **OpenHuman (Managed)** (saved)

## Known limitation
> [!warning] Beta bug — not infra
> OpenHuman v0.57.44 receives a valid **200 OK** from the router in ~1s but its UI hangs on "Thinking", and its own commands hit "not allowed by ACL". Confirmed across two separate servers — a client-side bug in the app, not your setup. Use the [[Models|EMPIRE PRIME web UI]] (:9090) as the reliable interface; revisit OpenHuman when they ship a fix.

Related: [[Infrastructure]] · [[Models]]

notes.title: Pending Actions
notes.text:
# Pending Actions (your login required)

Part of [[EMPIRE OS]]. These three need your accounts — they can't be done for you.

> [!todo] 1 · Add a free LLM key
> Get a free Groq key at console.groq.com/keys, then add to the VPS `.env` and restart the api container. Unlocks instant speed. See [[Free LLM APIs]].

> [!todo] 2 · Point the domain + HTTPS
> In Hostinger, set the `6-empires.com` A-record to **64.227.6.197**. Then the cert auto-issues for https://6-empires.com. See [[Infrastructure]].

> [!todo] 3 · Revoke the DigitalOcean API token
> cloud.digitalocean.com/account/api/tokens — the migration token is no longer needed.

---
Also: [[OpenHuman]] beta chat bug is on the app vendor (not actionable by us).
